attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  NXSSANRT.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
  ,NXSSANRT.SK_TSL_UNIQUE_ID_INT          
  ,NXSSANRT.ORDERED_PRODUCT_KEY           
  ,NXSSANRT.ATTRIBUTION_FLG               
  ,NXSSANRT.CISCO_BOOKED_FLG              
  ,NXSSANRT.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD                
  ,NXSSANRT.SKU_QTY                       
  ,NXSSANRT.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_LIST_PRICE    
  ,NXSSANRT.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE     
  ,NXSSANRT.BOOKINGS_PCT                  
  ,NXSSANRT.ATTRIBUTION_PCT               
  ,NXSSANRT.TSL_TRX_TYPE_CD               
  ,NXSSANRT.TSL_EXCEPTION_REASON_CD       
  ,NXSSANRT.ATTRIBUTED_EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE
  ,NXSSANRT.ATTRIBUTED_EXTENDED_NET_PRICE 
  ,NXSSANRT.SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_CD           
  ,NXSSANRT.SALES_VALUE_TRXL_AMT          
  ,NXSSANRT.MTHLY_RCRR_REV_TRXL_AMT       
  ,NXSSANRT.INCRMTL_MTHLY_RCRR_REVTRXL_AMT
  ,NXSSANRT.ANNUAL_RCRR_CHARGE_TRXL_AMT   
  ,NXSSANRT.NON_RCRR_REV_TRXL_AMT         
  ,NXSSANRT.INCRMTL_ANNL_RECUR_REVTRXL_AMT
  ,NXSSANRT.INCRMTL_MLTYR_RCRR_REVTRXL_AMT
  ,NXSSANRT.ORDER_VALUE_LOCAL_AMT 
  ,NXSSANRT.ATTRIBUTION_CD                
  ,NXSSANRT.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT         
  ,NXSSANRT.EXCEPTION_STATUS_CD           
  ,NXSSANRT.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM             
  ,NXSSANRT.DV_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT
  ,NXSSANRT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY   
  ,NXSSANRT.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY
  ,NXSSANRT.CCW_WEB_ORDER_ID              
  ,NXSSANRT.EXCEPTION_DETAIL_DESCR        
  ,NXSSANRT.ORIGINAL_TRX_QTY              
  ,NXSSANRT.EDW_CREATE_DTM
  ,NXSSANRT.EDW_CREATE_USER
  ,NXSSANRT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM
  ,NXSSANRT.EDW_UPDATE_USER
  ,NXSSANRT.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY    
  ,NXSSANRT.DV_NET_CHANGE_FLG
  ,NXSSANRT.START_TV_DTM
  ,NXSSANRT.END_TV_DTM  
 ,NXSSANRT.PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT 
  ,NXSSANRT.POB_TYPE_CD
 ,NXSSANRT.DV_POB_TOP_PRDT_KEY
  ,NXSSANRT.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /* NRS PI3 CHANGE  */
 ,NXSSANRT.RECOGNIZED_SALES_VALUE_LOCAL_AMT
 ,NXSSANRT.ACV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT
   , NXSSANRT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT   /* SIGORANT ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY19 */ 
   ,NXSSANRT.AS_ARCHITECTURE_FLG
 /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY21 ACV SCOPE*/
,NXSSANRT.TRANSACTIONAL_ACV_FLG
,NXSSANRT.ACV_FLG
,NXSSANRT.ANNUAL_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
,NXSSANRT.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD
/*END OF Q1FY21 ACV SCOPE*/
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
   ,CASE WHEN ( NXSSA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT IS NULL AND NXSSA.START_TV_DTM IS NULL  )THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE
/*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
,NXSSANRT.ATTR_UNT_WHLSL_PRC_LST_LOC_AMT
   FROM 
  $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCRPN_ATRBN_NRT_TV NXSSANRT
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  (SELECT BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,START_TV_DTM FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCRPTN_ATTRBTN_TV  GROUP BY 1,2 )NXSSA
   ON NXSSANRT.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=NXSSA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
  AND NXSSANRT.START_TV_DTM=NXSSA.START_TV_DTM
   WHERE NXSSANRT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM >='$$LastExtractDate'
